tools.name: Pentest Framework Cheat Sheet
tools.description: Interactive reference guide for 9 penetration testing frameworks across 6 categories — PTES, NIST SP 800-115, ISSAF, OWASP WSTG, WASC TCv2, MITRE ATT&CK, OSSTMM, CSA CCM, OWASP MASTG. Includes when to use each framework, full descriptions, strengths, limitations, and direct links to official documentation. Dark/light/eye-saver themes, searchable, filterable by category.

tools.name: DEF CON 27 SEV Notes
tools.description: Curated, structured collection of notes from DEF CON 27 Social Engineering Village talks on social engineering, psychology, OSINT, red teaming, human behavior, and defensive strategies.

tools.name: RedTeam Arsenal
tools.description: Your Ultimate Pentest & Red Team Cheatsheets Hub — curated resources, cheatsheets, and tools for security professionals, penetration testers, and red teamers.

tools.name: SQLi Auth Bypass Cheatsheet
tools.description: Ready-to-use SQLi payloads for bypassing login pages. Designed for educational purposes and authorized security testing.

tools.name: Privacy Cheatsheets Hub
tools.description: Comprehensive guide to online privacy and security.

tools.name: Google Bughunting Dork Cheatsheet
tools.description: Categorized collection of Google Dorks for security researchers and bug bounty hunters to streamline reconnaissance and vulnerability discovery.

tools.name: ary.osint
tools.description: Comprehensive, well-organized directory of Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) tools, resources, and research materials. Centralized launcher for security researchers and OSINT enthusiasts.

tools.name: Ary Recon
tools.description: Comprehensive web-based passive reconnaissance tools directory.

tools.name: Awesome Search Engines for CyberSec
tools.description: Curated collection of powerful search engines used by cybersecurity professionals for OSINT, red teaming, threat intelligence, malware research, and cyber investigations.

tools.name: ARY.UNIVERSITY
tools.description: Your gateway to free cybersecurity knowledge. Explore curated online courses, hands-on labs, AI tools, and learning paths for beginners to advanced learners.

tools.name: ip-subnet-calculator
tools.description: A modern, interactive IPv4 subnet calculator built for learners and pentesters. This web app calculates network addresses, broadcast addresses, usable host range, block size, and more, while explaining each step so you understand why the calculations work.

tools.name: Ip-Range-Calculator
tools.description: This webpage helps you understand and calculate IPv4 address ranges using simple math and clear explanations. It is designed for learners, pentesters, and networking beginners who want to see how IP ranges actually work instead of memorizing formulas.

tools.name: Interactive OSI Model Simulator
tools.description: An interactive, emoji-based simulator of the OSI model designed to help users visualize how data travels from one computer to another. Covers OSI layers, encapsulation, de-encapsulation, TCP vs UDP, and network transmission with adjustable speed and full animations.

tools.name: MetaLyzer
tools.description: Client-side web app that extracts deep metadata (EXIF, XMP, IPTC, GPS) from images, videos, and documents entirely in your browser — no data ever uploaded.

tools.name: ARYSIG
tools.description: Browser-based tool for viewing and modifying file magic bytes (file signatures), built for cybersecurity research, CTF challenges, and forensics work.

tools.name: PhantomPath
tools.description: Client-side utility demonstrating URL obfuscation techniques. Understand how attackers mask malicious destinations for robust defense and user training.

tools.name: MemoryPoison
tools.description: AI Recommendation Poisoning — a real-world attack technique where adversaries inject persistent instructions into AI assistant memory through crafted URLs.

tools.name: popstate-hijack-demo
tools.description: Client-side History API abuse, shown as a safe educational PoC.

tools.name: ARYCRYPT
tools.description: A sleek, hacker-themed file encryption web app that lets you encrypt any file into .ary format and decrypt it back with a password. Perfect for secure file sharing or just playing with crypto!

tools.name: ZeroTrustText
tools.description: Secure, Password-Based Text Encryption & Decryption.

tools.name: HunterVault
tools.description: Web-based repository of 200+ bug bounty and penetration testing tools. Organized reference for security researchers, ethical hackers, and bug bounty hunters.

tools.name: SQL Reverse Shell Generator
tools.description: Exclusively designed for authorized security testing, educational purposes, and controlled red teaming simulations.

tools.name: KeyCraft
tools.description: A modern, sleek, and customizable password generator web application built with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

tools.name: SVG Attack Lab
tools.description: Fully client-side browser tool for demonstrating, injecting, and analyzing SVG-based attack vectors — for authorized security research, CTFs, and controlled lab environments.

tools.name: SMUGGLR
tools.description: Browser-based Unicode steganography and text obfuscation toolkit for invisible characters, homoglyphs, whitespace ciphers, and Unicode payload hiding — all client-side, zero network calls.

tools.name: TrustNoChar
tools.description: Zero-dependency browser lab demonstrating how Unicode homoglyphs and typosquatting exploit human visual perception. Transforms text into deceptive lookalike variants in real time.

tools.name: Ref_XSS
tools.description: A Hands-On DOM Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Learning Lab.

tools.name: JSStressTester
tools.description: JSStressTester is a lightweight, browser-based educational load/stress tester that simulates repeated HTTP requests (via image requests) to help you learn about request patterns, server logging, and basic load effects. Made for authorized testing and labs only.
